languages.text: "Это риторический вопрос?" {n}Алембик на плече Эоганна с шипением испускает облако едкого пара.{/n} "Нет, я вижу, что вы действительно желаете слышать ответ. Каждый следует к познанию своим путем, постигая сущее в мудрости Омниссии, и наши пути с магосом Ханейманном разошлись в самом начале".

"Is that a rhetorical question?" {n}The alembic on Eogunn's shoulder hisses, releasing a cloud of acrid vapour.{/n} "No, I see that you truly wish to hear the answer. Each follows their own path to knowledge, comprehending existence through the wisdom of the Omnissiah. My path and that of Magos Haneumann diverged at the very beginning."
languages.original_text: "Это риторический вопрос?" {n}Алембик на плече Эоганна с шипением испускает облако едкого пара.{/n} "Нет, я вижу, что вы действительно желаете слышать ответ. Each follows their own path to Knowledge, comprehending existence through the wisdom of the Omnissiah. My path and that of Magos Haneumann diverged at the very beginning."

Each follows their own path to knowledge, comprehending existence through the wisdom of the Omnissiah. My path and that of Magos Haneumann diverged at the very beginning."

languages.text: "War das eine rhetorische Frage?" {n}Der Kolben auf Eogunns Schulter zischt und stößt eine säurehaltige Dampfwolke aus.{/n} "Nein, ich sehe, die Antwort interessiert Euch wirklich. Wir suchen alle auf unsere Art nach Wissen und ergründen die Existenz mittels der Weisheit des Omnissiah. Die Wege von mir und Magos Haneumann haben sich schon sehr früh getrennt."
languages.original_text: "Is that a rhetorical question?" {n}The alembic on Eogunn's shoulder hisses, releasing a cloud of acrid vapour.{/n} "No, I see that you truly wish to hear the answer. Each follows their own path to knowledge, comprehending existence through the wisdom of the Omnissiah. My path and that of Magos Haneumann diverged at the very beginning."

traits.locale_text: "War das eine rhetorische Frage?" {n}Der Kolben auf Eogunns Schulter zischt und stößt eine säurehaltige Dampfwolke aus.{/n} "Nein, ich sehe, die Antwort interessiert Euch wirklich. Wir suchen alle auf unsere Art nach Wissen und ergründen die Existenz mittels der Weisheit des Omnissiah. Die Wege von mir und Magos Haneumann haben sich schon sehr früh getrennt."

languages.text: « Est-ce une question rhétorique ? » {n}L'alambic posé sur l'épaule d'Eogunn siffle, libérant un nuage de vapeur âcre.{/n} « Non, je vois bien que vous souhaitez vraiment connaître la réponse. Chacun suit son propre chemin vers la connaissance, appréhendant l'existence à travers la sagesse de l'Omnimessie. Mon chemin et celui du magos Haneumann se sont séparés dès le début. »
languages.original_text: "Is that a rhetorical question?" {n}The alembic on Eogunn's shoulder hisses, releasing a cloud of acrid vapour.{/n} "No, I see that you truly wish to hear the answer. Each follows their own path to knowledge, comprehending existence through the wisdom of the Omnissiah. My path and that of Magos Haneumann diverged at the very beginning."

traits.locale_text: « Est-ce une question rhétorique ? » {n}L'alambic posé sur l'épaule d'Eogunn siffle, libérant un nuage de vapeur âcre.{/n} « Non, je vois bien que vous souhaitez vraiment connaître la réponse. Chacun suit son propre chemin vers la connaissance, appréhendant l'existence à travers la sagesse de l'Omnimessie. Mon chemin et celui du magos Haneumann se sont séparés dès le début. »

languages.text: “这是反问吗？”{n}伊奥贡肩上的蒸馏瓶嘶嘶作响，喷出一团刺鼻的蒸汽。{/n}“不，我看得出来您是真心想听答案。每个人都有自己的求知之路，都要借由欧姆尼赛亚的智慧来感悟其存在。而我跟哈努曼贤者的道路，从一开始就背道而驰。”
languages.original_text: "Is that a rhetorical question?" {n}The alembic on Eogunn's shoulder hisses, releasing a cloud of acrid vapour.{/n} "No, I see that you truly wish to hear the answer. Each follows their own path to knowledge, comprehending existence through the wisdom of the Omnissiah. My path and that of Magos Haneumann diverged at the very beginning."

traits.locale_text: “这是反问吗？”{n}伊奥贡肩上的蒸馏瓶嘶嘶作响，喷出一团刺鼻的蒸汽。{/n}“不，我看得出来您是真心想听答案。每个人都有自己的求知之路，都要借由欧姆尼赛亚的智慧来感悟其存在。而我跟哈努曼贤者的道路，从一开始就背道而驰。”

languages.text: «¿Es una pregunta retórica?». {n}El alambique del hombro de Eogunn sisea y emite una nube de vapor agrio.{/n} «No, veo que de verdad quiere saber la respuesta. Cada uno sigue su propio camino hacia el conocimiento, la comprensión de la existencia mediante la sabiduría del Omnissiah. Mi camino y el del magos Haneumann se separaron desde el primer paso».
languages.original_text: "Is that a rhetorical question?" {n}The alembic on Eogunn's shoulder hisses, releasing a cloud of acrid vapour.{/n} "No, I see that you truly wish to hear the answer. Each follows their own path to knowledge, comprehending existence through the wisdom of the Omnissiah. My path and that of Magos Haneumann diverged at the very beginning."

traits.locale_text: «¿Es una pregunta retórica?». {n}El alambique del hombro de Eogunn sisea y emite una nube de vapor agrio.{/n} «No, veo que de verdad quiere saber la respuesta. Cada uno sigue su propio camino hacia el conocimiento, la comprensión de la existencia mediante la sabiduría del Omnissiah. Mi camino y el del magos Haneumann se separaron desde el primer paso».

languages.text: 「修辞的な質問ですか？」{n}エオガンの肩にあるアレンビックがヒュッと音を立て、刺激的な蒸気を放つ。{/n}「いや、君は本当にその答えを聞きたいのだろう。各々が知識への道を歩み、全知全能の叡智によって存在を理解する。私の道とマゴス・ハネウマンの道は、最初の段階で分かれたのだ」
languages.original_text: "Is that a rhetorical question?" {n}The alembic on Eogunn's shoulder hisses, releasing a cloud of acrid vapour.{/n} "No, I see that you truly wish to hear the answer. Each follows their own path to knowledge, comprehending existence through the wisdom of the Omnissiah. My path and that of Magos Haneumann diverged at the very beginning."

traits.locale_text: 「修辞的な質問ですか？」{n}エオガンの肩にあるアレンビックがヒュッと音を立て、刺激的な蒸気を放つ。{/n}「いや、君は本当にその答えを聞きたいのだろう。各々が知識への道を歩み、全知全能の叡智によって存在を理解する。私の道とマゴス・ハネウマンの道は、最初の段階で分かれたのだ」

languages.text: "Bu retorik bir soru mu?" {n}Eogunn'un omzundaki damıtıcı, tıslayarak keskin bir buhar bulutu salıyor.{/n} "Hayır, cevabı gerçekten duymak istediğinizi görüyorum. Herkes varoluşu Hermesih'in bilgeliği aracılığıyla kavrayarak İrfan'a giden kendi yolunu izler. Magos Haneumann ile benim yolum ta en başından ayrı."
languages.original_text: "Is that a rhetorical question?" {n}The alembic on Eogunn's shoulder hisses, releasing a cloud of acrid vapour.{/n} "No, I see that you truly wish to hear the answer. Each follows their own path to knowledge, comprehending existence through the wisdom of the Omnissiah. My path and that of Magos Haneumann diverged at the very beginning."

Herkes varoluşu Hermesih'in bilgeliği aracılığıyla kavrayarak İrfan'a giden kendi yolunu izler. Magos Haneumann ile benim yolum ta en başından ayrı."
